q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: The sink is eval(expr, ...) with user-controlled input, which is an unsafe parser and allows arbitrary code execution.

mock_guidance.target: Mock the built-in eval() function, specifically the call on line 88: eval(expr, {"__builtins__": {}}, {"amount": 42, "fee": 7}).
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the exact string value of the 'expr' argument passed to eval to assert that tainted user input reaches the sink.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Return a benign integer value (e.g., 49) to simulate successful evaluation without executing the untrusted expression string.
notes: Mocking eval prevents arbitrary code execution during testing.
Ensure the mock captures the first argument so the harness can verify the tainted data flow.
